channel.title: jb-marketplace-plugins-jetbrains
channel.description: The latest JetBrains plugins on the JetBrains marketplace
channel.dc:creator: Jonathan Lermitage

item.title: GraphQL PHP Bridge - Thu Apr 30 12:39:48 UTC 2026
item.description:
Connects your GraphQL schema and your PHP resolvers, so the IDE understands them as a single codebase. Navigation GraphQL → PHP: click any resolver string in a...
vendor: iNET downloads: 4 pricingModel: PAID xmlId: com.inet-dev.graphql-php-bridge

item.title: Scalar OpenAPI Preview - Thu Apr 30 15:32:06 UTC 2026
item.description:
This plugin allows to use Scalar as OpenAPI specifications preview.
vendor: Vincent MONOT downloads: 3 pricingModel: FREE xmlId: dev.vmonot.scalar-openapi-preview

item.title: Webox - Web Box - Thu Apr 30 15:12:13 UTC 2026
item.description:
Webox — Manage and browse web pages right inside your IDE, without switching to a browser. Sidebar panel to manage bookmarks (name, URL, description) with group...
vendor: webox downloads: 4 pricingModel: FREE xmlId: com.duanzs.webox

item.title: Svelte Hero - Sat May 02 01:56:24 UTC 2026
item.description:
The plugin adds first-class support for Svelte single-file components to IntelliJ IDEA and other JetBrains IDEs with web-language support. Installation Once you...
vendor: Language Heroes downloads: 2 pricingModel: PAID xmlId: com.langheroes.svelte

item.title: SDF Account Status - Fri Apr 24 20:26:22 UTC 2026
item.description:
Overview Displays the active SuiteCloud SDF default account from project.json directly in the status bar. Auto-detects defaultAuthId (and legacy DefaultAuthID...
vendor: Gonzalo Facello downloads: 2 pricingModel: FREE xmlId: com.sdf.accountstatus

item.title: GitOps Cockpit for Argo CD - Sun May 03 08:12:08 UTC 2026
item.description:
Monitor, sync, and manage your Argo CD GitOps deployments without leaving your IDE. GitOps Cockpit brings the full power of Argo CD directly into IntelliJ IDEA. Free...
vendor: Michael Latta Software downloads: 30 pricingModel: FREEMIUM xmlId: de.ml.argocd.gitops-cockpit

item.title: Sout Boy - Sun May 03 03:46:34 UTC 2026
item.description:

vendor: Pedro Ribeiro downloads: 13 pricingModel: FREE xmlId: com.github.pedrorbeiro.soutboy

item.title: Groovy Live Templates - Thu Apr 30 09:34:52 UTC 2026
item.description:
Adds support for Groovy in IDE live templates.
vendor: JetBrains s.r.o. downloads: 3 pricingModel: FREE xmlId: org.intellij.groovy.live.templates

item.title: Build Sound Notifier - Thu Apr 30 09:05:45 UTC 2026
item.description:
Plays a custom sound and flashes an image overlay on build success or failure. Separate sound (WAV or MP3) and image (PNG / JPG / GIF / BMP) for success and failure...
vendor: Squaredem downloads: 7 pricingModel: FREE xmlId: com.squaredem.buildsoundnotifier

item.title: Codex Assistant - Thu Apr 30 07:13:11 UTC 2026
item.description:
Run Codex CLI from inside JetBrains IDE via the built-in terminal. How to Open Shortcut: Press Ctrl+Shift+X or option+command+X to open the terminal in your current...
vendor: krong downloads: 116 pricingModel: FREE xmlId: com.codex.assistant

item.title: Nginx Lens - Thu Apr 30 06:53:52 UTC 2026
item.description:
Nginx Lens adds focused editor support for Nginx configuration files in JetBrains IDEs. It provides syntax highlighting, inspections for common configuration mistakes...
vendor: CarlRenny downloads: 139 pricingModel: FREE xmlId: com.agomuseum.nginxlens

item.title: CPH Target Runner - Sun May 03 16:03:37 UTC 2026
item.description:
A CLion sidebar helper for competitive-programming samples. Manage sample cases per CMake target, run them quickly, compare outputs, and inspect mismatched lines.
vendor: kkkzbh downloads: 39 pricingModel: FREE xmlId: org.kkkzbh.cph

item.title: velk - Fri May 01 06:51:24 UTC 2026
item.description:

vendor: Vincent Vella downloads: 41 pricingModel: FREE xmlId: com.vincentvella.velk

item.title: OpenClaw - Wed Apr 29 20:58:48 UTC 2026
item.description:

vendor: gguf downloads: 42 pricingModel: FREE xmlId: com.github.gguf.openclaw

item.title: Inline Unified Diff - Sun May 03 20:24:45 UTC 2026
item.description:

vendor: Clement Sehan downloads: 19 pricingModel: FREE xmlId: com.github.clementsehan.inlineunifieddiffjetbrains

item.title: LuaAttachDebug - Wed Apr 29 14:10:35 UTC 2026
item.description:

item.title: LuaUnity - Wed Apr 29 11:48:09 UTC 2026

item.description:
